title: MaskQL: query-time masking, filtering, and pseudonymization for governed access to live databases
description: MaskQL is an open-source middleware for governed access to live databases in sensitive environments such as healthcare. Built on top of Trino, it applies masking, filtering, encryption, and pseudonymization rules at query time without modifying source systems. It supports per-user access control across schemas, tables, and columns, and includes transformations for structured and unstructured clinical data, including text extracted from PDF documents.
